title: rosa communis var. pubescens
intro: Rosa communis var. pubescens, also known as the common rose or wild rose, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. pubescens include reducing fever, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Rosa communis var. pubescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and wounds.
